description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pyudev CI that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and manually from the Actions tab. The workflow consists of two jobs: python-checks and development_environment_checks. The python-checks job uses a matrix strategy to test with different Python versions (3.11, 3.10, and pypy-3.9) and runs tests using make. The development_environment_checks job uses a matrix strategy to run various development environment checks (fmt-travis, yamllint, package, and lint) in a fedora:39 container.
